name: muse-egg-core
description: Open-source OC life engine for long-lived original characters.

scripts.build:packages: npm -w @muse-egg/oc-schema run build && npm -w @muse-egg/core run build && npm -w @muse-egg/adapters run build && npm -w @muse-egg/ui run build && npm -w @muse-egg/starter-oc run build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm -w @muse-egg/desktop run build
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm -w @muse-egg/desktop run dev
scripts.web: npm run build:packages && npm -w @muse-egg/desktop run web
scripts.companion: npm run build:packages && npm -w @muse-egg/desktop run companion
